full_text:
Su Fei 蘇非
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Su Fei (蘇非). General of Guan Yu, tried to take Xiangyang but was driven back by Yue Jin. Su Fei was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
